name: button
description: Triggers an action or event. Built on React Aria's Button for full keyboard and screen-reader support.

variant.description: Visual style conveying the action's emphasis and intent.

isDisabled.description: Prevents interaction and dims the control.

isIconOnly.description: Renders a square, label-less button for a single icon.

fullWidth.description: Stretches the button to fill its container.

a11y.notes: Icon-only buttons must provide an aria-label. Focus ring and keyboard activation come from React Aria.
